briefdescription.para: pointer on a DistanceMatrix object
number of individuals
number of clusters
cluster sizes
individual assignments
individual-cluster distances
individual lengths
Copy of a Clusters object.
Destruction of the data members of a Clusters object.
Plot of a Clusters object.
Sort of the individuals of a cluster by increasing average distance to another individual of the cluster.
Selection of the farthest individual assigned to the same cluster.
Selection of the closest individual assigned to another cluster.
Selection of the closest cluster for a given individual.
Computation of the cluster diameter (maximum within-cluster distance).
Computation of the cluster separation (minimum between-cluster distance).
Computation of the cluster isolation property.

parameterdescription.para: property at the individual (INDIVIDUAL) or cluster (CLUSTER_SCALE) level.

briefdescription.para: Computation of the average distance between a given cluster and all the other clusters.
Computation of within-cluster and between-cluster distances and writing of the results.
Initialization of prototypes as a function of the average distance of an individual to the other individuals.
Initialization of prototypes (Kaufman & Rousseeuw, pp. 102-103).
Update of the distances between individuals of the old and new cluster and the associated lengths as a function of the change in assignment of an individual.
Step of a partitioning clustering algorithm.
Step of a partitioning clustering algorithm (Kaufman & Rousseeuw, pp. 103-104).
Default constructor of the Clusters class.
Constructor of the Clusters class.
Constructor of the Clusters class.
Destructor of the Clusters class.
Assignment operator of the Clusters class.
Writing on a line of a Clusters object.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, const std::string path, bool exhaustive=false) const
memberdef.name: ascii_write

briefdescription.para: Writing of a Clusters object in a file at the spreadsheet format.
Plot of a Clusters object using Gnuplot.
Plot of a Clusters object.
Computation of cluster sizes.
Computation of individual-cluster distances and associated lengths on the basis of individual assignment to clusters.
Computation of between-cluster distances and associated lengths.
Computation of between-cluster distances and associated lengths on the basis of individual-cluster distances and associated lengths.
Partitioning clustering results.
